title: medicago obscura var. lenticularis
intro: Medicago obscura var. lenticularis, also known as the blue lupin, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Medicago obscura var. lenticularis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with its seeds and leaves being used in herbal preparations, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
